data.title: Codexis (NASDAQ: CDXS) to announce Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 6, 2025, conference call at 4:30 pm ET.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, on October 23, 2025, Codexis, Inc., a prominent company specializing in enzymatic solutions for the efficient production of complex therapeutics, disclosed its plan to disclose financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on Thursday, November 6, 2025, after market hours. The company, listed under NASDAQ as CDXS, will have its management conduct a conference call and webcast at 4:30 pm Eastern Time to review the financial outcomes and offer a business update.

data.title: Greenbelt Capital Partners adds new senior hires, including Katie Kiersey as Chief of Strategy and Operating Partner.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on October 23, 2025, Greenbelt Capital Partners, a private equity firm focusing on investments in the New Energy Economy, revealed the appointment of new key team members. Katie Kiersey, who serves as the Chief of Strategy and Operating Partner, was among the notable additions. The firm has boosted its talent roster by bringing in multiple senior hires as part of its strategic expansion efforts.

data.title: Garmin partners with Truemed to let U.S. customers use pre-tax HSA/FSA funds on fitness products.
data.description: A program for reimbursement is now available for eligible customers in the U.S., enabling them to utilize pre-tax funds toward smartwatches and cycling products. Based in Olathe, Kansas, the collaboration between Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) and healthcare payments provider Truemed aims to assist qualified individuals in accessing their Health Savings Account (HSA) or Flexible Spending Account (FSA) for this purpose. This initiative was officially launched on October 23, 2025.

data.title: Old Republic International Corp to acquire Everett Cash Mutual Insurance Co pending approval - Oct 23, 2025.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, in Chicago, Old Republic International Corporation (NYSE: ORI) revealed its plan to acquire Everett Cash Mutual Insurance Co. and its affiliated companies, pending regulatory and policyholder consent. The agreement, once approved, will result in ORI taking over ECM.

data.title: Ardagh Metal Packaging S.A. reports 9% revenue growth in Q3 2025, reaching $1,428 million compared to $1,313 million in Q3 2024.
data.description: Luxembourg, October 23, 2025 - Ardagh Metal Packaging S.A. (NYSE: AMBP) released its third-quarter financial results for the period ending September 30, 2025. In the three months ending September 30, 2025, the company reported a revenue of $1.428 billion, showing a 9% increase from the same period in 2024 when revenue was $1.313 billion. The revenue figures are provided in millions of dollars, and all financial data is presented in constant currency to isolate the impact of exchange rate fluctuations.

data.title: Labcorp to bring FDA-cleared Elecsys® pTau181 test to primary care by early 2026, aiding in Alzheimer's prevention.
data.description: Labcorp, a leading provider of laboratory services, has revealed plans to launch Roche's Elecsys® pTau181 test across the country by early 2026. The test, renowned for its accuracy, will be widely available to the public. This decision was announced in Burlington, N.C. on October 23, 2025. Labcorp, known for its cutting-edge solutions, is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol LH.

data.title: Ardagh Metal Packaging S.A. (NYSE: AMBP) declares $0.10 per share quarterly dividend, payable on Nov 13, 2025.
data.description: Luxembourg-based Ardagh Metal Packaging S.A. (NYSE: AMBP) has disclosed that its board of directors has greenlighted a quarterly interim dividend of $0.10 per ordinary share. The dividend will be disbursed on November 13, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as such on November 3, 2025.

data.title: Altisource reports Q3 2025 financial results. Leader in real estate and mortgage industries.
data.description: Luxembourg, 23rd October 2025 - Altisource Portfolio Solutions S.A. disclosed its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025. The Company, a key player and hub in the real estate and mortgage sectors, operating under the ticker symbol NASDAQ: ASPS, announced its quarterly results today.

data.title: Iridium Communications reports Q3 2025 results, updates full-year outlook; leading provider of global satellite services.
data.description: Iridium Communications Inc., a prominent global provider of satellite services for voice, data, and PNT, headquartered in McLean, Virginia, shared its financial performance for Q3 2025. Listed on Nasdaq as IRDM, the company revealed an update on its full-year 2025 projections. The information was released on October 23, 2025.

data.title: Quarterhill (TSX: QTRH) will announce Q3 2025 results on Nov 6, 2025. Chuck Myers, CEO, and David Charron, CFO, to host call.
data.description: Quarterhill Inc., a publicly traded company on the TSX and OTCQX with tickers QTRH and QTRHF respectively, is scheduled to disclose its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2025 and the year-to-date results up to September 30, 2025, on Thursday, November 6, 2025. The conference call will be spearheaded by Chuck Myers, the Chief Executive Officer, and David Charron, the Chief Financial Officer.

data.title: Old Republic Corp reported Q3 2025 net income of $279.5 million, compared to $338.9 million last year.
data.description: Old Republic International Corporation (NYSE: ORI) announced its third quarter 2025 results in Chicago on Oct. 23. The company reported a net income of $279.5 million, showing a decline from $338.9 million in the same period last year. Excluding investment gains/losses, the net operating income was...

data.title: Ripple co-founder selling XRP at all-time highs, raising concerns about its impact on price recovery.
data.description: Since 2018, Chris Larsen, co-founder and former CEO of Ripple, has collected millions in profits from XRP. This move has raised concerns about the potential impact on the price recovery of the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Revolut gains MiCA license in Cyprus for EU crypto services, to offer 280+ tokens, max 22% staking, and stablecoin.
data.description: Revolut recently announced its forthcoming Crypto 2.0 platform that will include a wide selection of more than 280 tokens. This platform will offer zero-fee staking with yields of up to 22% APY and the option for a stablecoin-to-US dollar conversion at a 1:1 ratio.

data.title: New integration between Keeper Security and Sentinel enhances threat detection with real-time visibility into credential activity and privileged access. Chicago, Oct. 23, 2025.
data.description: A recent integration of a SIEM system in Chicago on Oct 23, 2025, has improved threat detection and response speed significantly. Keeper Security, a prominent Privileged Access Management (PAM) platform, is at the forefront of this initiative, offering real-time monitoring of credential activity and privileged access risks. This development aims to provide increased visibility and control over potential security threats, ultimately enhancing overall cybersecurity measures.

data.title: Creator Television® launches on-demand offerings on Plex and Xumo Play, marking AVOD debut. Sabio Holdings (TSXV: SBIO) (OTCQB: SABOF) leads expansion. Los Angeles-based ad-tech firm assists global brands.
data.description: Sabio Holdings (TSXV: SBIO) (OTCQB: SABOF), a Los Angeles ad-tech company, announces the debut of its advertising-based video-on-demand (AVOD) services. The company is expanding its distribution deals to help top global brands reach, engage, and connect with their audiences. The news was released on October 23, 2025, marking a significant milestone for Sabio as it enters the AVOD market.

data.title: Rock Tech aims to cut €50 million off Guben Lithium Converter's CapEx, lowering it from €730 million to €680 million.
data.description: Anticipated improvements are projected to bring down the estimated total capital expenditures ("CapEx") for the lithium refinery converter in Guben, Brandenburg, known as the Guben Lithium Converter or the Project, from €730 million to €680 million. Additionally, a 23% reduction has been forecasted in conjunction with these optimizations.

data.title: Noma partners with Novonesis to enhance flavors using biology, aiming for healthier, tastier products.
data.description: Noma, recognized as one of the top restaurants globally, has teamed up with Novonesis, a leading biosolutions company, to enhance the level of deliciousness. This partnership aims to combine culinary expertise with biology to develop flavors and items that are not only more appealing but also healthier and eco-friendlier.

data.title: CBRE Group Q3 2025: Revenue up 14% to $10.3B, GAAP EPS up 66% to $1.21, GAAP net income up 61% to $363M, Core EBITDA up 19% to $821M.
data.description: CBRE Group, Inc. announced their financial results for the third quarter ending on September 30, 2025. Highlights include a 66% increase in GAAP EPS to $1.21 and a 34% increase in Core EPS to $1.61. Revenue saw a significant rise of 14% to $10.3 billion, with Resilient Businesses revenue up by 14% to $8.4 billion, and Transactional Businesses revenue up by 13% to $1.9 billion. GAAP net income also increased by 61% to $363 million, and Core EBITDA rose by 19% to $821 million. Moreover, the company saw a net cash flow of $1.7 billion from operations and nearly $1.5 billion in free cash flow.
